svg.title: Multi-agent research system architecture
svg.desc: A graph showing four agents (Planner, Researcher, Critic, Writer) orchestrated by a Supervisor node, with shared state and tool access.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Supervisor agent do in a multi-agent research system?')
sendPrompt('What should the Planner agent do in a multi-agent research system?')
sendPrompt('What should the Researcher agent do in a multi-agent research system?')
sendPrompt('What should the Critic agent do in a multi-agent research system?')
sendPrompt('What should the Writer agent do in a multi-agent research system?')
